title: Mirrored Column info not following over
excerpt: For some reason when I created a connection between my accounts and leads boards the information is not flowing from leads to a mirrored column in accounts but it is flowing from accounts to a mirrored column in Leads. H…

posts.author: hometown (Ian)
posts.cookedHtml:
For some reason when I created a connection between my accounts and leads boards the information is not flowing from leads to a mirrored column in accounts but it is flowing from accounts to a mirrored column in Leads. How do I fix this?

Here is a video:

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @hometown ,

Welcome to the monday community!

It is possible that what you are seeing is because the connect columns were originally created as a one-way connection, though I cannot verify that without looking more closely into your account.

I would suggest contacting monday support, so that your issue is quickly resolved in case it is a bug.

image694×843 88 KB

Best Regards,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
